title: BSNC to Provide COVID-19 Assistance to Shareholders Impacted by the Pandemic
summary: The Bering Straits Native Corporation (BSNC) Board of Directors announced today they have approved a CARES Act Direct Assistance Program (DAP) for eligible shareholders. In August, BSNC received $15 million in federal CARES Act funding and has developed the DAP to provide needs-based assistance dire...

title: Virtual Recovery Camp “Llangarwik”
summary: Virtual Recovery Camp "Llangarwik" a place of awakening. For more information call 907-602-8644 or email EydieF@Chugachmiut.org The post Virtual Recovery Camp “Llangarwik” first appeared on Chugachmiut .
